name: CHILL FISHING
short_description: 🎣 Chill Fishing – Fish, Upgrade, Relax! Cast your hook, explore the depths, catch unique fish, and discover rare species. Upgrade your gear, unlock new biomes, and progress at your own pace in a simple, relaxing fishing experience.
detailed_description:
🎣 Chill Fishing – Relax, Catch, Upgrade!

Dive into the soothing depths of Chill Fishing, a minimalist fishing game where every cast is a new adventure. Cast your hook, explore the ocean depths, catch colorful fish, and discover rare and legendary species.

Upgrade your gear, unlock new biomes, and push your exploration further. Whether you have 5 minutes or hours to spare, Chill Fishing is the perfect experience to relax while feeling the thrill of the perfect catch.

✨ Features:

🎯 Simple, relaxing gameplay accessible to everyone

🐟 Collect dozens of unique fish, from common to rare species

⚙️ Upgrade your hook to catch more fish and reach new depths

🌍 Unlock diverse biomes, each with unique marine life

💰 A smooth economy to progress at your own pace, stress-free

Play, relax… and let the sea surprise you.
